name: A.M.O.R
desc: The client required a facelift for an existing label design. I crafted a design for the client's label package. The result was more than just a label, but a visual representation of their identity. By seamlessly integrating their core values into the design, I created a visually appealing label that resonated with their target audience and differentiated them in the market.
